cross_scene_arcs.title: Embracing the Cowboy Hustler Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Joe constructs and commits to a self-fashioned identity as a cowboy hustler, rejecting his past life and attempting to use charm and performance to access wealth in the East.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: successfully deceives but not admitted into home
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: growing disconnect between identity and livelihood

cross_scene_arcs.title: Isolation and Failed Connection on the Journey East
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Joe repeatedly attempts to connect with others during his journey and early time in New York, but each interaction ends in emotional distance or rejection, reinforcing his isolation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: in transit toward a new phase
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Joe's confession is met with minimal reaction, leaving him exposed
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his difficulty in forming genuine connections with others despite efforts to engage

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Erosion in the Hustle
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Joe's need for money leads him to exploit and ultimately assault clients, marking a descent from manipulation to violence and theft.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: securing money or valuables from clients
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: obtains money through physical force and intimidation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Joe struggles with the contradiction between his need to survive and his discomfort with becoming a violent thief

cross_scene_arcs.title: Dependency and Care in the Joe-Ratso Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Joe's relationship with Ratso evolves from reluctant coexistence to interdependent partnership, culminating in Joe assuming caretaker and survivor roles after Ratso's death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: settling into an uneasy coexistence in shared living space
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: determined to change his life but emotionally isolated after Ratso's death
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how he will rebuild his life alone in Miami

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Hustle to Shared Escape Plan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ratso transitions from a transactional hustler arranging connections for cash to co-creating a shared dream of escape to Miami, which becomes a driving goal for both him and Joe despite his deteriorating health.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ratso seeks short-term payment for services
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ratso dies en route to Miami, the unfulfilled destination of their joint escape
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The dream of a better life in Florida remains unrealized due to Ratso's death

cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Dignity and Reclamation of Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ratso moves from being exposed as destitute and humiliated to asserting his real name and demanding to be called Rico, seeking dignity in both identity and environment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ratso is searched and revealed to have only sixty-four cents, begging not to be hit
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ratso insists on being called Rico and finds momentary peace when Joe complies
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His plea for respect is cut short by his death before the new identity can be fully realized

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deepening Dependency and Emotional Bond with Joe
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ratso's relationship with Joe evolves from transactional to emotionally interdependent, marked by vulnerability, care, and mutual reliance, culminating in Joe carrying and then burying him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ratso is mocked and physically distanced from Joe
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Joe carries Ratso down the stairs and assumes responsibility for his burial
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Joe's emotional response to the loss remains unexplored

cross_scene_arcs.title: Initiation and Collapse of the Joe-Ratso Alliance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The partnership between Joe and Ratso begins with opportunism, shifts through conflict and vulnerability, and ends with Joe honoring Ratso's final journey, marking a transformation in their bond.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ratso approaches Joe to initiate a hustle
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Joe commits to burying Ratso in Miami, fulfilling a promise implied by their journey
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Joe's actions reflect genuine loyalty or a sense of obligation remains ambiguous

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Attraction to Transaction
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shirley moves from recognizing mutual attraction with Joe to objectifying him as a sexual fantasy, culminating in a transaction where she pays for his companionship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: emotional versus commercial value of the exchange

cross_scene_arcs.title: Intimacy and Power Struggle
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Following initial physical contact, Shirley navigates escalating intimacy with Joe, shifting from emotional tension to combative physical dominance during their encounter.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Shirley gains upper hand in physical dynamic
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: ongoing struggle for dominance in physical intimacy

cross_scene_arcs.title: Integration of Joe into Shirley's Life
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shirley incorporates Joe into her daily routine and social identity, offering him ongoing access and financial support, signaling a shift from transaction to embedded presence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Joe granted domestic access and financial support
